channel.title: Felipe Cabargas — Views Are My Own
channel.description: Thinking out loud on product, AI, and what it means to build responsibly.

item.title: The Efficiency Paradox: Burnout in the Agentic Era
item.description: AI agents promise infinite productivity — but constant supervision, hallucination debugging, and non-deterministic output may be creating a new kind of burnout faster than any manual process did before.

item.title: Chile's Privacy Law Deadline Is Closer Than You Think — And Your Legal Team Can't Fix This Alone
item.description: Ley Nº 21.719 becomes fully enforceable on December 1, 2026. Most organizations doing business in Chile are delegating this to their legal departments — the same mistake European companies made before GDPR hit.

item.title: Product Teams Are Losing the AI Race — And It's Not About Budget
item.description: The gap isn't budget or leadership buy-in. It's a technical understanding gap that's quietly becoming an abyss — and most product teams don't see it coming.

item.title: It's 2007 All Over Again: Feature-SaaS vs. Smart-SaaS
item.description: AI adoption in SaaS is echoing the shift from feature phones to smartphones. The winners won't be those who ship the most AI features — they'll be the ones who bet on data.

item.title: The Hate on Vibe-Coding, and Why It's an Overreaction
item.description: AI-driven 'vibe-coding' isn't the threat people think it is — and the outrage reveals more about the industry's anxieties than any real technical risk.
